africa.name: Africa
africa.description: Dramatic coastlines and unique marine ecosystems
africa.bestTime: Varies by region; generally May–October for southern Africa, October–April for Red Sea.

comoros.name: Comoros
comoros.bestTime: October's calm seas and dry weather make it the most favorable time, with mild water temperatures ranging from 26–30°C.

kenya.name: Kenya
kenya.description: Indian Ocean reefs, turtles, and big pelagics.
kenya.bestTime: February to April and November to December bring the calmest seas in Kenya, with water at a warm 28–29°C. For pelagic encounters and visibility, consider diving October to March.

mayotte.name: Mayotte
mayotte.bestTime: Calmest seas appear from February to March and November to December, with water warming up to 29–30°C.

mozambique.name: Mozambique
mozambique.description: Whale sharks, manta rays, and pristine Indian Ocean beaches.
mozambique.bestTime: The period from June to September delivers calm seas and clear water, as temperatures hover around 24–25°C. May to November also sees enhanced visibility and the presence of big marine animals.

south-africa.name: South Africa
south-africa.description: Shark diving, sardine run, kelp forests, and subtropical reefs.
south-africa.bestTime: May–September for sharks and sardine run; year-round for kelp forests.
south-africa.bestTimeAuto: From June to August, the seas lie calmest, the water runs clearest, and the rains hold off. The water peaks at a warm 25–26°C in summer, cooling to around 20°C in winter. Conditions vary by coast.

tanzania.name: Tanzania
tanzania.description: Zanzibar, Mafia Island, and vibrant coral reefs.
tanzania.bestTime: February in Tanzania delivers calm seas and dry conditions, with warm water at 29–30°C. For extended favorable conditions, explore October through March.

dar-es-salaam-region.name: Dar es Salaam Region
dar-es-salaam-region.description: Diving in Dar es Salaam Region.

morocco.name: Morocco
morocco.description: Atlantic coast diving, kelp forests, and rocky reefs.
morocco.bestTime: From June to September, the seas calm and water clears, with temperatures rising to a mild 22–23°C. May through October provides optimal conditions overall.

djibouti.name: Djibouti
djibouti.description: Whale sharks, Gulf of Tadjoura, and unique marine life.
djibouti.bestTime: In the Indian Ocean, dive June to August for calm seas and dry weather. The Red Sea offers similar conditions June and August to September, with waters warming to 31–32°C. Whale sharks gather November to February.

sudan.name: Sudan
sudan.description: Red Sea wrecks, sharks, and pristine reefs.
sudan.bestTime: July to August offers the calmest seas and driest months in Sudan, with water temperatures reaching a warm 31–32°C. Consider diving October to June for favorable conditions.

namibia.name: Namibia
namibia.description: Remote Atlantic coast, shipwrecks, and cold-water diving at the edge of the Namib Desert.

ethiopia.name: Ethiopia
ethiopia.description: Landlocked country in the Horn of Africa. No direct ocean access, but sometimes appears in data.

somalia.name: Somalia
somalia.description: Untouched Indian Ocean reefs and remote diving.

senegal.name: Senegal
senegal.description: Wrecks, reefs, and Atlantic marine life off West Africa.
senegal.bestTime: Between July and October, Senegal's waters reach their clearest, with temperatures warming to 28–29°C. For those seeking visibility, consider November to May as prime months.

cape-verde.name: Cape Verde
cape-verde.description: Volcanic islands, caves, and big Atlantic pelagics.
cape-verde.bestTime: From May to July, the water runs clearest and the rains hold off. The water is warmest at 27–28°C, easing to around 23°C at its coolest.

saint-helena-island.name: Saint Helena Island
saint-helena-island.bestTime: February to May brings the clearest water, with warm temperatures of 28–29°C, perfect for exploring the underwater landscapes.

al-bahr-al-ahmar.name: Al Bahr Al Ahmar
al-bahr-al-ahmar.description: Diving in Al Bahr Al Ahmar.
